subcodes.first_line: O compassionate God! Though we are but destitute children and helpless infants, distressed and bereft of all order [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدای مهربان هر چند کودکانیم بینوا و طفلانیم ناتوان پریشانیم و بیسر و سامان
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @prayer for children and youth, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for teaching, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
